scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "DOTNET_HOSTBUILDER__RELOADCONFIGONCHANGE=false dotnet run --project src/DotnetBoiler.Api --urls http://localhost:5189" "npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && dotnet publish src/DotnetBoiler.Api -c Release -o publish
